title: selaginella arizonica
intro: Selaginella arizonica, also known as Arizona spike moss or Arizona spikemoss, is a type of non-vascular plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae, native to the southwestern United States. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella arizonica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
